Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ReturnOrderItemTax

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ReturnOrderItemTax
public class ReturnOrderItemTax extends SObject

Java class for ReturnOrderItemTax complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ReturnOrderItemTax">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Amount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Rate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrder" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ReturnOrder" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderItemAdjustment" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ReturnOrderItemAdjustment" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderItemAdjustmentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderItemTaxNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderLineItem" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ReturnOrderLineItem" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderLineItemId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TaxEffectiveDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
